title: festuca macra
intro: Festuca macra, also known as Devil's Beard, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Festuca macra include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and aid in the relief of congestion. Herbal preparations of Festuca macra typically include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and inhalants for respiratory support.
